location: Dropped by Commoner enemies throughout the game — reliable early spots are Ailing Village in the Weeping Peninsula, and a room of roughly ten sleeping Commoners above the Living Jars in Stormveil Castle.
tactics: In Ailing Village, several frenzy-maddened Commoners gather around a central pyre and can drop the sword.
In Stormveil Castle, from the Secluded Cell grace head west and up the ramp toward the Living Jars, then hug the left wall along the wooden balcony to find a room with roughly ten sleeping Commoners.
Base drop rate is around 2%, so expect a handful of repeat kills to get one.
lore: A short, wide-bladed straight sword once known as 'the sword of the people' for its simplicity — faint Erdtree engravings remain on its surface, but time has worn it down to a shadow of what it used to be.

builds.name: Beginner Str/Dex
builds.why: Even D/D scaling and easy farmability make it a solid free early replacement or backup weapon.
